controls.control_objective: To ensure be read along with the 'guidelines on acquisition and holding of shares or voting rights in banking companies' issued by the reserve bank of india (he
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be read along with the 'Guidelines on Acquisition and Holding
of Shares or Voting Rights in Banking Companies' issued by the Reserve Bank of India
(hereinafter referred to as 'Guidelines').
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be read along with the 'guidelines on acquisition and holding of shares or voting rights in banking companies' issued by the reserve bank of india (he

controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (commercial banks - acquisition and holding of shares or voting rights) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
These directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks -
Acquisition and Holding of Shares or Voting Rights) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (commercial banks - acquisition and holding of shares or voting rights) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure become effective on the day these are placed on the official website of the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
These directions shall become effective on the day these are placed on the official
website of the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to become effective on the day these are placed on the official website of the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to commercial banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banking companies or banks' and individually, as a 'banking company' or ba
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be applicable to Commercial Banks (hereinafter collectively
referred to as 'Banking Companies or banks' and individually, as a 'Banking
Company' or bank).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to commercial banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banking companies or banks' and individually, as a 'banking company' or ba

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to foreign banks, operating either through branch mode or wholly owned subsidiary (wos) mode
controls.control_description:
Provided that these Directions shall not be applicable to foreign banks, operating
either through branch mode or Wholly Owned Subsidiary (WOS) mode.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to foreign banks, operating either through branch mode or wholly owned subsidiary (wos) mode

controls.control_objective: To ensure bear the meanings assigned to them below, and their cognate expressions and variations shall be construed accordingly: (1) 'acquisition' means acquiri
controls.control_description:
In these Directions, unless the context otherwise requires, the terms used shall
bear the meanings assigned to them below, and their cognate expressions and
variations shall be construed accordingly:
(1) 'acquisition' means acquiring, or agreeing to acquire, shares or voting rights in
a banking company, directly or indirectly;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to bear the meanings assigned to them below, and their cognate expressions and variations shall be construed accordingly: (1) 'acquisition' means acquiri

controls.control_objective: To ensure include equity shares and preference shares, as mentioned in section 12(1) (ii) of the banking regulation act, 1949
controls.control_description:
Explanation (i) 'Shares' shall include equity shares and preference shares, as
mentioned in Section 12(1) (ii) of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include equity shares and preference shares, as mentioned in section 12(1) (ii) of the banking regulation act, 1949

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as provided in explanation iii to rule 2(h) of companies (significant beneficial owners) rules, 2018
controls.control_description:
Explanation (ii) The term 'indirectly' shall have the same meaning as provided in
Explanation III to Rule 2(h) of Companies (Significant Beneficial Owners) Rules,
2018.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as provided in explanation iii to rule 2(h) of companies (significant beneficial owners) rules, 2018

controls.control_objective: To ensure the total holding, directly or indirectly, beneficial or otherwise, of shares or voting rights by a person along with his relatives, associate enterpr
controls.control_description:
(2) 'aggregate holding' means the total holding, directly or indirectly, beneficial or
otherwise, of shares or voting rights by a person along with his relatives,
associate enterprises and persons acting in concert with him in a banking
company;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to the total holding, directly or indirectly, beneficial or otherwise, of shares or voting rights by a person along with his relatives, associate enterpr

controls.control_objective: To ensure illustratively include entities related to one or more other entities because they all have the same shareholder structure without a single controllin
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of this definition, indirect acquisition of shares or voting rights by a
person (natural or legal) may include, amongst others, such acquisition by:
Explanation: The term 'under the same management or control or owner' shall
illustratively include entities related to one or more other entities because they
all have the same shareholder structure without a single controlling shareholder
or because they are managed on a unified basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to illustratively include entities related to one or more other entities because they all have the same shareholder structure without a single controllin

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applied to recognize the promoter and promoter group of the person
controls.control_description:
Explanation: For the purpose of these Directions, the norms for recognizing the
promoter group of a banking company shall be applied to recognize the
promoter and promoter group of the person.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applied to recognize the promoter and promoter group of the person

controls.control_objective: To ensure also include private equity funds, its general partners and limited partners, investment manager or any other person doing similar activity of managin
controls.control_description:
Explanation: 'person' shall also include Private Equity funds, its General Partners
and Limited Partners, investment manager or any other person doing similar
activity of managing funds of one or more persons.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also include private equity funds, its general partners and limited partners, investment manager or any other person doing similar activity of managin

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as defined in section 2(27) of companies act, 2013- control shall include the right to appoint majority of the directors or to c
controls.control_description:
Explanation: 'Control' shall have the same meaning as defined in Section 2(27) of
Companies Act, 2013- Control shall include the right to appoint majority of the
directors or to control the management or to control policy decisions exercisable
by a person or persons acting individually or in concert, directly or indirectly,
including by virtue of their shareholding or management rights or shareholders
agreements or voting agreements or in any other manner.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as defined in section 2(27) of companies act, 2013- control shall include the right to appoint majority of the directors or to c

controls.control_objective: To ensure include proxy adviser for one or more persons with authorisation to exercise voting rights
controls.control_description:
Explanation: Proxy voters shall include Proxy Adviser for one or more persons with
authorisation to exercise voting rights.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include proxy adviser for one or more persons with authorisation to exercise voting rights

controls.control_objective: To ensure the person making an application under section 12b of the banking regulation act, 1949
controls.control_description:
(3) 'applicant' means the person making an application under Section 12B of the
Banking Regulation Act, 1949;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to the person making an application under section 12b of the banking regulation act, 1949

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as assigned to it in the securities and exchange board of india (substantial acquisition of shares and takeovers) regulations, 2
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as assigned to it in the securities and exchange board of india (substantial acquisition of shares and takeovers) regulations, 2

controls.control_objective: To ensure be computed assuming that all the instruments (including convertible instruments) issued/ to be issued to the person have been converted into shares (
controls.control_description:
Explanation: The shareholding shall be computed assuming that all the instruments
(including convertible instruments) issued/ to be issued to the person have been
converted into shares (with applicable voting rights) and deemed to be included in
the paid-up share capital or total voting rights of the banking company.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be computed assuming that all the instruments (including convertible instruments) issued/ to be issued to the person have been converted into shares (

controls.control_objective: To ensure a natural person or a legal person
controls.control_description: (6) 'person' means a natural person or a legal person;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a natural person or a legal person

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as defined in section 2(77) of the companies act, 2013 and rules made thereunder
controls.control_description:
(7) 'relative' shall have the same meaning as defined in Section 2(77) of the
Companies Act, 2013 and rules made thereunder;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as defined in section 2(77) of the companies act, 2013 and rules made thereunder

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as stated in companies (significant beneficial owners) rules, 2018
controls.control_description:
and
(8) 'significant beneficial owner' shall have the same meaning as stated in
Companies (Significant Beneficial Owners) Rules, 2018.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as stated in companies (significant beneficial owners) rules, 2018

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the banking regulation act, 1949
controls.control_description:
All other expressions, unless defined herein, shall have the same meaning as have
been assigned to them under the Banking Regulation Act, 1949.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the banking regulation act, 1949

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place a board-approved 'fit and proper' criterion for major shareholders, which shall consider, at a minimum, the criteria mentioned herein
controls.control_description:
A banking company shall put in place a board-approved 'fit and proper' criterion for
major shareholders, which shall consider, at a minimum, the criteria mentioned
herein.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to put in place a board-approved 'fit and proper' criterion for major shareholders, which shall consider, at a minimum, the criteria mentioned herein

controls.control_objective: To ensure include, at a minimum: (1) for acquisition of five per cent or more but less than 10 per cent in the banking company:
controls.control_description:
Explanation: The illustrative criteria for determining 'fit and proper' status of
applicants/major shareholders shall include, at a minimum:
(1) For acquisition of five per cent or more but less than 10 per cent in the banking
company:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include, at a minimum: (1) for acquisition of five per cent or more but less than 10 per cent in the banking company:

controls.control_objective: To ensure to seek previous approval of the reserve bank by submitting an application, through pravaah, to the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
Any person who intends to make an acquisition which is likely to result in major
shareholding in a banking company, is required to seek previous approval of the
Reserve Bank by submitting an application, through PRAVAAH, to the Reserve
Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to to seek previous approval of the reserve bank by submitting an application, through pravaah, to the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure seek comments from the banking company on the proposed acquisition
controls.control_description:
On receipt of the application and declaration from the applicant, the Reserve Bank
may seek comments from the banking company on the proposed acquisition.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to seek comments from the banking company on the proposed acquisition

controls.control_objective: To ensure deliberate on the proposed acquisition and assess the 'fit and proper' status of the person based on the information provided as well as due diligence
controls.control_description:
On receipt of the reference from the Reserve Bank, the Board of Directors (the
Board) of the banking company shall deliberate on the proposed acquisition and
assess the 'fit and proper' status of the person based on the information provided
as well as due diligence undertaken by the banking company, without prejudice to
the generality of the aspects to be considered.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to deliberate on the proposed acquisition and assess the 'fit and proper' status of the person based on the information provided as well as due diligence

controls.control_objective: To ensure furnish its comments to the reserve bank, after considering all relevant aspects, along with a copy of the relevant board resolution and information i
controls.control_description:
The concerned banking company shall furnish its comments to the Reserve Bank,
after considering all relevant aspects, along with a copy of the relevant board
resolution and information in Form A1 specified in these Directions, within 30 days
of receipt of the reference from the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to furnish its comments to the reserve bank, after considering all relevant aspects, along with a copy of the relevant board resolution and information i

controls.control_objective: To ensure be binding on the applicant and the concerned banking company
controls.control_description:
The decision of the Reserve Bank to (i) accord or deny permission or (ii) accord
permission for acquisition of a lower quantum of aggregate holding than that has
been applied for, shall be binding on the applicant and the concerned banking
company.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be binding on the applicant and the concerned banking company

controls.control_objective: To ensure impose such conditions on the applicant and the concerned banking company as deemed fit while according the permission
controls.control_description:
The Reserve Bank may impose such conditions on the applicant and the
concerned banking company as deemed fit while according the permission.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to impose such conditions on the applicant and the concerned banking company as deemed fit while according the permission

controls.control_objective: To ensure be permitted to acquire major shareholding in a banking company
controls.control_description:
The persons from Financial Action Task Force (FATF) non-compliant
jurisdictions shall not be permitted to acquire major shareholding in a banking
company.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be permitted to acquire major shareholding in a banking company

controls.control_objective: To ensure include high-risk jurisdictions subject to a call for action, and jurisdictions under increased monitoring
controls.control_description:
Explanation (1) FATF non-compliant jurisdictions shall include high-risk
jurisdictions subject to a call for action, and jurisdictions under increased
monitoring.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include high-risk jurisdictions subject to a call for action, and jurisdictions under increased monitoring

controls.control_objective: To ensure also apply to various jurisdictions through which the funds for investments are routed
controls.control_description:
Explanation (2) The restriction in paragraph 15 shall also apply to various
jurisdictions through which the funds for investments are routed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also apply to various jurisdictions through which the funds for investments are routed

controls.control_objective: To ensure be any further acquisition without prior approval of the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
The existing major shareholders from such FATF non-compliant jurisdictions will,
however, be allowed to continue with their investment, provided that there shall not
be any further acquisition without prior approval of the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be any further acquisition without prior approval of the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure , however, at any point of time, consider the fitness of such persons holding shares and pass appropriate orders on their permissible voting rights in
controls.control_description:
Reserve
Bank may, however, at any point of time, consider the fitness of such persons
holding shares and pass appropriate orders on their permissible voting rights in
accordance with the law and applicable rules.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , however, at any point of time, consider the fitness of such persons holding shares and pass appropriate orders on their permissible voting rights in

controls.control_objective: To ensure continuously monitor that the following persons are 'fit and proper' on an ongoing basis: (1) its major shareholders, including promoter(s) with major
controls.control_description:
A banking company shall continuously monitor that the following persons are 'fit
and proper' on an ongoing basis:
(1) its major shareholders, including promoter(s) with major shareholding, who
have completed the approved acquisition;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continuously monitor that the following persons are 'fit and proper' on an ongoing basis: (1) its major shareholders, including promoter(s) with major

controls.control_objective: To ensure : (1) put in place a mechanism to obtain information on a continuous basis on any changes in the information provided in form a appended to the 'guide
controls.control_description:
In addition to the requirements in paragraph 17, a banking company shall:
(1) put in place a mechanism to obtain information on a continuous basis on any
changes in the information provided in Form A appended to the 'Guidelines' or
any other development which may have a bearing on the 'fit and proper' status
of major shareholders / applicants;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to : (1) put in place a mechanism to obtain information on a continuous basis on any changes in the information provided in form a appended to the 'guide

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place a mechanism to obtain information on any change in significant beneficial owner or acquisition by a person to the extent of <image> 10 pe
controls.control_description:
A banking company shall put in place a mechanism to obtain information on any
change in Significant Beneficial Owner or acquisition by a person to the extent of
<image>
10 per cent or more of paid-up equity share capital of the major shareholder.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to put in place a mechanism to obtain information on any change in significant beneficial owner or acquisition by a person to the extent of <image> 10 pe

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be guided by the information sought in form a appended to the 'guidelines'
controls.control_description:
In
seeking the information, the banking company shall also be guided by the
information sought in Form A appended to the 'Guidelines'.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to also be guided by the information sought in form a appended to the 'guidelines'

controls.control_objective: To ensure conduct requisite due diligence to ascertain whether the major shareholder continues to be 'fit and proper'
controls.control_description:
Based on the information so received, the concerned banking company shall
conduct requisite due diligence to ascertain whether the major shareholder
continues to be 'fit and proper'.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to conduct requisite due diligence to ascertain whether the major shareholder continues to be 'fit and proper'

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit a brief report on such changes, along with the board note and resolution, to department of regulation, reserve bank of india, within 30 days fr
controls.control_description:
A banking company shall submit a brief report on such changes, along with the
Board note and resolution, to Department of Regulation, Reserve Bank of India,
within 30 days from receipt of such information.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit a brief report on such changes, along with the board note and resolution, to department of regulation, reserve bank of india, within 30 days fr

controls.control_objective: To ensure establish a continuous monitoring mechanism to ascertain that a major shareholder has obtained prior approval of the reserve bank for the shareholding
controls.control_description:
A banking company shall establish a continuous monitoring mechanism to
ascertain that a major shareholder has obtained prior approval of the Reserve Bank
for the shareholding/voting rights.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to establish a continuous monitoring mechanism to ascertain that a major shareholder has obtained prior approval of the reserve bank for the shareholding

controls.control_objective: To ensure be immediately brought to the notice of the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
Any violation of sub-section (1) of section 12B of
Banking Regulation Act, 1949 shall be immediately brought to the notice of the
Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be immediately brought to the notice of the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure also include one acquiring share or entitled to exercise voting rights through invocation of encumbrance of shares
controls.control_description:
Explanation: The major shareholder for this purpose shall also include one
acquiring share or entitled to exercise voting rights through invocation of
encumbrance of shares.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also include one acquiring share or entitled to exercise voting rights through invocation of encumbrance of shares

controls.control_objective: To ensure be made to the reserve bank by the banking company along with a copy of board resolution and necessary documents
controls.control_description:
Even when the acquisition / aggregate holding is less than five per cent of paid-up
share capital or voting rights of a banking company, a reference shall be made to
the Reserve Bank by the banking company along with a copy of board resolution
and necessary documents, if it has reason to believe that the methods adopted are
meant to circumvent the statutory requirements.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be made to the reserve bank by the banking company along with a copy of board resolution and necessary documents

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit periodical reports on the continuous monitoring arrangements to its board, which inter alia, shall include assessment of compliance to sub-sect
controls.control_description:
A banking company shall submit periodical reports on the continuous monitoring
arrangements to its Board, which inter alia, shall include assessment of
compliance to sub-section (5) of Section 12B of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit periodical reports on the continuous monitoring arrangements to its board, which inter alia, shall include assessment of compliance to sub-sect

controls.control_objective: To ensure report the details in the form a2 specified in these directions within 14 days of completion of the allotment process
controls.control_description:
After issue and allotment of shares, a banking company shall report the details in
the Form A2 specified in these directions within 14 days of completion of the
allotment process.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to report the details in the form a2 specified in these directions within 14 days of completion of the allotment process

controls.control_objective: To ensure be breached
controls.control_description:
The banking company shall also ensure that the limits approved
by the Reserve Bank for a person shall not be breached.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be breached

controls.control_objective: To ensure forward the details on encumbrance of shares reported by promoter(s) and promoter group, in form b appended to the 'guidelines', to the department of
controls.control_description:
The banking company shall forward the details on encumbrance of shares reported
by promoter(s) and promoter group, in Form B appended to the 'Guidelines', to the
Department of Supervision, Reserve Bank of India, within one working day.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to forward the details on encumbrance of shares reported by promoter(s) and promoter group, in form b appended to the 'guidelines', to the department of

controls.control_objective: To ensure place a report on the said encumbrance of shares before its board and submit a report to department of regulation, reserve bank of india within 30 day
controls.control_description:
The banking company shall place a report on the said encumbrance of shares
before its Board and submit a report to Department of Regulation, Reserve Bank
of India within 30 days from the date of encumbrance of shares.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to place a report on the said encumbrance of shares before its board and submit a report to department of regulation, reserve bank of india within 30 day

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to remain repealed
controls.control_description:
The
Directions, instructions and guidelines repealed prior to the issuance of these
Directions shall continue to remain repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to remain repealed

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be governed by the provisions thereof
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken, or
initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions or guidelines shall continue to
be governed by the provisions thereof.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be governed by the provisions thereof

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as governed by these directions
controls.control_description:
All approvals or acknowledgments granted
under these repealed lists shall be deemed as governed by these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as governed by these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure in any way prejudicially affect: a
controls.control_description:
Further, the repeal of these directions, instructions, or guidelines shall not in any
way prejudicially affect:
a.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to in any way prejudicially affect: a

controls.control_objective: To ensure be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline
controls.control_description:
and
any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted, continued,
or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if
those directions, instructions, or guidelines had not been repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force
controls.control_description:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation of
the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being
in force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final and binding
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order to
remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of these
Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary clarifications in
<image>
respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of any provision of
these Directions given by the RBI shall be final and binding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final and binding

controls.control_objective: To ensure be indicated separately
controls.control_description:
major
Major
total voting rights prior
up share capital or
No
shareholding
shareholder
to issue of shares
total voting rights post
issue of shares
Explanation: In case the holding of the major shareholder in percentage of paid-up share capital is different from
the percentage of voting rights of the banking company, the same may be indicated separately.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be indicated separately

controls.control_objective: To ensure to obtain previous approval of the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
In terms of sub-section (1) of Section 12B of Banking Regulation Act, 1949, every
person, who intends to acquire shares or voting rights and intends to be a major
shareholder of a banking company, is required to obtain previous approval of the
Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to to obtain previous approval of the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure specify conditions under sub- section (4) of section 12b of banking regulation act,1949, including a validity period for completing such acquisition
controls.control_description:
While granting approvals, the Reserve Bank may specify conditions under sub-
section (4) of Section 12B of Banking Regulation Act,1949, including a validity
period for completing such acquisition.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to specify conditions under sub- section (4) of section 12b of banking regulation act,1949, including a validity period for completing such acquisition

controls.control_objective: To ensure be permitted to acquire major shareholding in the banking company
controls.control_description:
The persons from Financial Action Task Force (FATF) non-compliant
jurisdictions shall not be permitted to acquire major shareholding in the banking
company.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be permitted to acquire major shareholding in the banking company

controls.control_objective: To ensure also apply to various jurisdictions through which the funds for investments are routed
controls.control_description:
Explanation (1) The restriction shall also apply to various jurisdictions through
which the funds for investments are routed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also apply to various jurisdictions through which the funds for investments are routed

controls.control_objective: To ensure include high-risk jurisdictions subject to a call for action, and jurisdictions under increased monitoring
controls.control_description:
Explanation (2) FATF non-compliant jurisdictions shall include high-risk
jurisdictions subject to a call for action, and jurisdictions under increased
monitoring.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include high-risk jurisdictions subject to a call for action, and jurisdictions under increased monitoring

controls.control_objective: To ensure be any further acquisition without prior approval of the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
However, the existing major shareholders from such FATF non-compliant
jurisdictions would be allowed to continue with their investment, provided that there
shall not be any further acquisition without prior approval of the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be any further acquisition without prior approval of the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure , however, review the 'fit and proper' status of such holders of shares or voting rights at any point of time and may take steps to limit their voting
controls.control_description:
The
Reserve Bank may, however, review the 'fit and proper' status of such holders of
shares or voting rights at any point of time and may take steps to limit their voting
rights in accordance with law.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to , however, review the 'fit and proper' status of such holders of shares or voting rights at any point of time and may take steps to limit their voting

controls.control_objective: To ensure inform the banking company of any change in the information provided in form a or any other development which may have a bearing on the 'fit and prope
controls.control_description:
In addition to furnishing the information sought by the banking company, major
shareholders who have completed the approved acquisition or applicants who
have obtained the approval to have major shareholding or applicants who have
submitted the application for obtaining the prior approval shall inform the banking
company of any change in the information provided in Form A or any other
development which may have a bearing on the 'fit and proper' status.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to inform the banking company of any change in the information provided in form a or any other development which may have a bearing on the 'fit and prope

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean approved by the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
Explanation: For the purpose of this paragraph, 'approved' shall mean approved
by the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean approved by the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to the following limits: (1) non-promoter: explanation: (a) for the definition of 'large industrial houses,' reference may be made to the r
controls.control_description:
Permission of the Reserve Bank to acquire shares or voting rights in a banking
company shall be subject to the following limits:
(1) Non-promoter:
Explanation: (a) For the definition of 'Large Industrial Houses,' reference may
be made to the Reserve Bank of India (Universal Banks - Licensing)
Guidelines, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to the following limits: (1) non-promoter: explanation: (a) for the definition of 'large industrial houses,' reference may be made to the r

controls.control_objective: To ensure be allowed to hold a higher percentage of shareholding as part of the licensing conditions or as part of the shareholding dilution plan submitted by t
controls.control_description:
During the period prior to the completion of the 15 years, the promoters of banking
companies may be allowed to hold a higher percentage of shareholding as part of
the licensing conditions or as part of the shareholding dilution plan submitted by
the banking company and approved by the Reserve Bank with such conditions as
deemed fit.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be allowed to hold a higher percentage of shareholding as part of the licensing conditions or as part of the shareholding dilution plan submitted by t

controls.control_objective: To ensure also permit higher shareholding [than the limits prescribed in paragraph 10 above] on a case-to-case basis under circumstances such as relinquishment
controls.control_description:
Reserve Bank may also permit higher shareholding [than the limits prescribed in
paragraph 10 above] on a case-to-case basis under circumstances such as
relinquishment by existing promoters, supervisory intervention including under
Prompt Corrective Action, reconstruction/restructuring of banks, entrenchment of
existing promoters or any other action in the interest of the banking company and
its depositors or in the interest of consolidation in the banking sector, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also permit higher shareholding [than the limits prescribed in paragraph 10 above] on a case-to-case basis under circumstances such as relinquishment

controls.control_objective: To ensure impose conditions as deemed fit (including dilution of such higher shareholding within a timeline)
controls.control_description:
While
<image>
allowing such higher shareholding, Reserve Bank may impose conditions as
deemed fit (including dilution of such higher shareholding within a timeline).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to impose conditions as deemed fit (including dilution of such higher shareholding within a timeline)

controls.control_objective: To ensure prescribe a differentiated shareholding dilution plan for such holdings
controls.control_description:
In specific cases where State Government / Central Government / Union Territory
/ Public Sector Undertaking / Public Financial Institution / specifically permitted
investors are promoters of banking companies or have been specifically permitted
by Reserve Bank to hold a higher shareholding as promoter/non-promoter in
certain special circumstances, Reserve Bank may prescribe a differentiated
shareholding dilution plan for such holdings.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to prescribe a differentiated shareholding dilution plan for such holdings

controls.control_objective: To ensure remain under lock-in for first five years from the date of completion of acquisition
controls.control_description:
In case of a person permitted by the Reserve Bank to have a shareholding of 10
per cent or more of the paid-up equity share capital of the banking company but
less than 40 per cent of the paid-up equity share capital, the shares acquired shall
remain under lock-in for first five years from the date of completion of acquisition.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to remain under lock-in for first five years from the date of completion of acquisition

controls.control_objective: To ensure remain under lock-in for first five years from the date of completion of acquisition
controls.control_description:
In case of any person permitted to have a shareholding of 40 per cent or more of
the paid-up equity share capital of the banking company, only 40 per cent of paid-
up equity share capital shall remain under lock-in for first five years from the date
of completion of acquisition.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to remain under lock-in for first five years from the date of completion of acquisition

controls.control_objective: To ensure be encumbered under any circumstances
controls.control_description:
The shares which are under lock-in, shall not be encumbered under any
circumstances.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be encumbered under any circumstances

controls.control_objective: To ensure to report details of creation/invocation/release of encumbrance on shares which are not under lock-in to the banking company within two working days o
controls.control_description:
Promoter(s) and promoter group are required to report details of
creation/invocation/release of encumbrance on shares which are not under lock-in
to the banking company within two working days of such an event in the format
specified in Form B.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to to report details of creation/invocation/release of encumbrance on shares which are not under lock-in to the banking company within two working days o

controls.control_objective: To ensure include voting rights against all shares issued by the banking company and is not restricted to 'exercisable' voting rights arrived at after cutting o
controls.control_description:
Explanation: "Total voting rights" shall include voting rights against all shares
issued by the banking company and is not restricted to 'exercisable' voting rights
arrived at after cutting off the rights beyond the maximum limit that can be
exercised by a single holder.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include voting rights against all shares issued by the banking company and is not restricted to 'exercisable' voting rights arrived at after cutting o

controls.control_objective: To ensure require the prior approval of the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
The
changes in the depository agreements shall require the prior approval of the
Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to require the prior approval of the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be given in a separate annexure) 11 source of funds for proposed acquisition of aggregate holding in the banking company (duly certified by the charte
controls.control_description:
(May be given in a separate annexure)
11 Source of funds for proposed acquisition of aggregate holding in the banking
company (Duly certified by the Chartered Accountant)
12 Total net worth, assets, profitability and average income of the applicant over the
last five years (Duly certified by the Chartered Accountant).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be given in a separate annexure) 11 source of funds for proposed acquisition of aggregate holding in the banking company (duly certified by the charte

controls.control_objective: To ensure be given in annexure with a copy of the agreement) 14 whether the applicant or any of the persons / entities listed at sr
controls.control_description:
Nature of declaration Declaration/Comments
13 A summary of agreement/shareholder agreement (May be given in annexure with
a copy of the agreement)
14 Whether the applicant or any of the persons / entities listed at Sr.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be given in annexure with a copy of the agreement) 14 whether the applicant or any of the persons / entities listed at sr

controls.control_objective: To ensure be necessary for a person to mention in the column about orders and findings made by regulators which have been later reversed / set aside in toto, it
controls.control_description:
(Though it shall not be necessary for a person to mention in the column about
orders and findings made by regulators which have been later reversed / set
aside in toto, it would be necessary to make a mention of the same in case the
reversal / setting aside is on technical reasons like limitation or lack of jurisdiction,
etc., and not on merit.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be necessary for a person to mention in the column about orders and findings made by regulators which have been later reversed / set aside in toto, it

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be mentioned)
controls.control_description:
If the order of the regulator is temporarily stayed and the
appellate / court proceedings are pending, the same should also be mentioned).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be mentioned)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be necessary for a person to mention in the column about orders and findings made by regulators which have been later on reversed / set aside in toto
controls.control_description:
(Though it shall not be necessary for a person to mention in the column
about orders and findings made by regulators which have been later on
reversed / set aside in toto, it would be necessary to make a mention of the
same, in case the reversal / setting aside is on technical reasons like
limitation or lack of jurisdiction, etc, and not on merit.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be necessary for a person to mention in the column about orders and findings made by regulators which have been later on reversed / set aside in toto

controls.control_objective: To ensure be mentioned)
controls.control_description:
If the order of the
regulator is temporarily stayed and the appellate / court proceedings are
<image>
pending, the same also should be mentioned).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be mentioned)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be given in a separate annexure)
controls.control_description:
42 Tabulation of details of the date of incorporation, PAN/TAN No., CIN No., DIN
No., Registered Office address, nature of business activity, income tax circle,
name of the regulator, type of registration, if any, bank, branch and account
number (including credit facilities and non-fund based facilities), net worth and
total of the entities listed in 33 above (May be given in a separate annexure).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be given in a separate annexure)
